zh.Hornby Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾宏比 卡素
zh.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.Scremerston, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德史可雷莫斯東
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Swinhoe於1340年出生在英國諾圖波藍德史可雷莫斯東時，她的父親William De Swynhowe27歲，母親Tughall21歲。她於大約1360年與John de St. Quintin結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1410年之前在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋。

zh-hans.Hornby Castle, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾宏比 卡素
zh-hans.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh-hans.Scremerston, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德史可雷莫斯東
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Swinhoe于1340年出生在英国諾圖波藍德史可雷莫斯東时，她的父亲William De Swynhowe27岁，母亲Tughall21岁。她于大约1360年与John de St. Quintin结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1410年之前在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Swinhoe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Swinney
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): variant of Swinhoe, a habitational name from Swinhoe in Bamburgh (Northumberland), from Old English swīn ‘swine, pig’ + hōh ‘heel, spur of land’.
Irish: perhaps, by assimilation, a variant of Sweeney (Mac Suibhne).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Swinhoe was born in 1340, in Scremerston, Northumberland, England, her father, William De Swynhowe, was 27 and her mother, Tughall, was 21. She married John de St. Quintin about 1360. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died before 1410, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Swinhoe est née en 1340, à Scremerston, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William De Swynhowe, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Tughall, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John de St. Quintin environ 1360. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 1410, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Swinhoe 1340 in Scremerston, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William De Swynhowe 27 und ihre Mutter Tughall 21. Sie hat um 1360 John de St. Quintin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 1410 in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Swinhoe è nata il nel 1340 nel Scremerston, Northumberland, England, sua padre, William De Swynhowe, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Tughall, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John de St. Quintin circa 1360. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì prima del 1410, nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England.

ja.Hornby Castle, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアホールンビー カストル
ja.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: イギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トイン
ja.Scremerston, Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランドスクレメルストン
ja.Hackforth, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアハクフォース
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Swinhoeが1340年にイギリスノースウンバーランドスクレメルストンで生まれた時，父William De Swynhoweは27歳，母Tughallは21歳であった。約1360年にJohn de St. Quintinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1410年以前にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Swinhoe(이)가 1340년 영국 노르스벌랜드 스크렘르스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William De Swynhowe(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Tughall(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1360년 John de St. Quintin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1410년 이전 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 사망했다.

mn.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: Newcastle upon Tyne, Norðhymbra land, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Swinhoe nasceu em 1340, em Scremerston, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Swynhowe, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Tughall, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John de St. Quintin aproximadamente 1360. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu antes 1410, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Swinhoe родилась в 1340 г. в местности скремирстон, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени William De Swynhowe было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Tughall, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de St. Quintin около 1360 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 1410 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Swinhoe nació en 1340, en Scremerston, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William De Swynhowe, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Tughall, tenía 21 años. Se casó con John de St. Quintin aproximadamente 1360. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió antes de 1410, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
